summary: Python standard library includes math, datetime, json, os, pathlib, random, and sys out of the box.
oneLineSummary: Python standard library provides rich built-in batteries-included modules.
keyTakeaways: Never name local files after stdlib modules.

commonErrors.cause: Local file shadows stdlib module name
